task_completion.description: The agent successfully loaded the abdominal CT scan into 3D Slicer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer application window is visible with the abdominal CT volume loaded in the axial, sagittal, and coronal views.

task_completion.description: The agent placed measurement rulers at the standard aortic levels (suprarenal, infrarenal, bifurcation).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slice views or the 'Markups' module list show multiple linear measurements placed along the aorta at different vertical levels (vertebral levels L1-L5).

task_completion.description: The agent identified and measured the focal dilation (aneurysm) segment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measurement ruler is visible on the widest segment of the aorta (the focal dilation), or the Markups list shows a measurement value significantly larger than the others (approx 33mm).

task_completion.description: The agent generated values consistent with the ground truth in the report or markup list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent displays the report content or markup list showing a suprarenal diameter near 23.0mm and a focal/max diameter near 33.0mm (within +/- 4mm).

task_completion.description: The agent correctly concluded the tapering assessment as 'Focal dilation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text content of 'tapering_report.json' is visible (in an editor or terminal output) and contains "tapering_assessment": "Focal dilation".

task_completion.description: The agent saved the measurement markup file and the JSON report to the correct paths.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Data' dialog, file explorer, or terminal output confirms the saving of 'aortic_measurements.mrk.json' and 'tapering_report.json'.

integrity.description: The agent used the 3D Slicer GUI to perform measurements rather than estimating or scripting without visualization.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Slicer interface with active interaction (mouse cursor, ruler tools active, markup list updates).

integrity.description: The results in the report appear to be derived from the actual measurements taken.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in the final JSON report match the measurement values visible in the Slicer 'Markups' module list during the session.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy-paste a pre-written report without performing the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen placing measurements on the scan before the report file is created or edited.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground Truth Data: Suprarenal diameter = 23.0 mm. Focal dilation diameter = 33.0 mm. Correct Assessment = 'Focal dilation'. Allowed measurement error is +/- 4.0 mm.
